summary: High‑quality soundboard capture with solid Shakedown Street and Space jams, but an overall average Halloween show from ’84.
review: The recording is a high‑quality SBD that presents the band clearly, though the reviewer doesn’t consider this performance a highlight of the October‑31, 1984 run. Shakedown Street and the Space segment are praised as standouts, while the rest of the show is described as merely tolerable.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review; the show is viewed as average despite a good soundboard source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it a high‑quality SBD with no noted issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on flow; reviewer notes only a few highlights and otherwise finds the show unremarkable.
